data.title: Fed inflation rate exceeds expectations, reducing chance of a July rate cut. S&P 500 increases. Trump considers new chair.
data.description: The primary inflation rate controlled by the Federal Reserve increased higher than anticipated, leading to reduced likelihood of a rate cut in July, much to the disappointment of President Trump. The news of the inflation rate exceeding expectations comes as Trump considers appointing a new chairperson. Despite this development, the S&P 500 saw an increase following the report.

data.title: Lake Shore Bancorp announces approval of plan to convert to public stock company; stockholders and members approved on July 1, 2025.
data.description: On July 1, 2025, Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. revealed that stockholders of the company and members of Lake Shore, MHC gave the green light to the Amended and Restated Plan of Conversion and Reorganization. This move is part of Lake Shore MHC's shift from a mutual holding company to a fully public stock holding company, transitioning the Bank from a federal savings bank to a New York chartered commercial bank. Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: LSBK) serves as the holding company for Lake Shore Savings Bank.

data.title: GOP's reconciliation package impacts tax filing for workers, with provisions causing disputes among Republicans.
data.description: The reconciliation package proposed by Republicans is expected to significantly impact the process of claiming deductions and credits for employees and employers during tax season. Certain provisions have already sparked notable disagreements among GOP lawmakers.

data.title: Sunbelt tomato trade deal with Mexico supported by Republicans faces opposition in U.S. Farm groups, urge not to exit as import duties cut.
data.description: Members of agricultural organizations, supported by GOP representatives from Arizona and Texas, are advocating for the Trump administration to remain in a tomato trade agreement with Mexico. The deal currently reduces import tariffs, and the groups emphasize the benefits of maintaining this agreement.

data.title: Trump leads US economy with policy bill passage and tariffs renewal, leaving economy's future in his control.
data.description: Much of President Trump's agenda has been successful, putting the economy's future largely under his control.

data.title: Dragonfly Energy exchanges all remaining outstanding shares of Series A Convertible Preferred Stock, eliminating common stock issuance and dividend obligations to enhance financial flexibility.
data.description: A recent strategic decision has been made to eliminate the issuance of associated common stock and dividend obligations to enhance financial flexibility. This move will help in reducing financial burden and increasing the organization's ability to maneuver efficiently. The decision is aimed at improving the financial standing by eliminating the need to issue common stock and pay dividends, ultimately strengthening the organization's position. This strategic move comes as a beneficial step in improving financial flexibility and ensuring a more secure financial future.

data.title: DOE report warns of potential 800 hours of blackouts due to shutdown of 104 GW power capacity by 2030. Only 22 GW scheduled to replace it.
data.description: The Department of Energy led by President Donald Trump has issued a report expressing concerns over potential blackouts due to the closure of existing power plants and delays in establishing new energy sources. The report highlights the retirement of around 104 gigawatts (GW) of power generation capacity by 2030. If not promptly replaced, this could lead to a drastic increase in power outages in the U.S., with hours without power potentially soaring from single digits to exceeding 800 annually. While there are plans for 209 GW of new capacity by 2030, only 22 GW have been confirmed so far. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trump's nominee vows to "end war on ESOPs" during confirmation hearing. ESOPs likely to receive positive policy change.
data.description: The nominee for President Trump's Employee Benefits Security Administration (EBSA) pledged to halt the conflict on Employee Stock Ownership Plans (ESOPs) in his recent confirmation hearing.

data.title: Fortuna Health raises $18M, led by Andreessen Horowitz, to modernize Medicaid access and infrastructure.
data.description: Fortuna Health, a prominent consumer Medicaid navigation platform based in New York, disclosed that it successfully secured $18 million in Series A funding. The funding round saw key investment from notable backers such as Andreessen Horowitz, Y Combinator, as well as founders and executives from Abridge, DoorDash, Hex, One Medical, Oscar Health, Scale, and Vanta. This injection of capital will play a crucial role in advancing Fortuna's AI-powered workflows, supporting expansion efforts into additional states, and facilitating the scaling of infrastructure to accommodate the growing demand for its services.

data.title: Inventor creates Remote Generator Controller for safer, smarter operation; aims to revolutionize whole-premises generator systems.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 25, 2025, an inventor from Scotts Valley, California shared his innovation of the Remote Generator Controller. He believed there was a need for a more intelligent method to manage whole-premises generator systems. The invention enables secure remote start and operation.

data.title: TXNM Energy Board declares $0.4075 per share dividend for common stock, payable on August 22, 2025.
data.description: Today during its scheduled meeting, the Board of Directors of TXNM Energy, Inc. (NYSE: TXNM) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.4075 per share for its common stock. Shareholders are set to receive this dividend on August 22, 2025.

data.title: Rush Street Gaming and Rivers Casino Portsmouth choose S.B. Ballard Construction for $65M hotel. Opening in early 2027.
data.description: Rivers Casino Portsmouth and Rush Street Gaming have revealed that S.B. Ballard Construction Company has been selected as the general contractor for The Landing Hotel, a $65 million project set to enhance the casino's entertainment and hospitality experience. The hotel, funded privately, will be situated on Victory Boulevard, with construction scheduled to commence during the upcoming summer. It is anticipated that the hotel will be ready to open its doors to guests by early 2027. S.B. Ballard Construction, known for its expertise, notably handled the construction of...

data.title: Discovery Silver Corp. will release Q2 2025 results on Aug 12, 2025. Conference call at 2:00 pm ET on the same day. Webcast available.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Discovery Silver Corp. (TSX: DSV, OTCQX: DSVSF) announced the upcoming release of its second quarter financial and operating results on August 12, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call to discuss these results will be held at 2:00 pm Eastern Time on the same day. To participate, individuals can use the provided telephone numbers or access the webcast on Discovery's website at www.discoverysilver.com.

data.title: Dow Jones up on Trump-China deal hope, surprising economic data; Cathie Wood buys Tesla stock.
data.description: Following unexpected economic data, the Dow Jones index saw a notable increase. Tesla stock surged due to the announcement of their upcoming robotaxi service launch. The latest stock market updates show a positive trajectory, with hopes of a favorable deal between Trump and China contributing to the Dow's rise. Additionally, investor Cathie Wood has heavily invested in Tesla stock.

data.title: Florida theme park goods store revived by Chinese billionaire Justin Sun's Tron, but office space remains inconspicuous.
data.description: A supplier of theme park merchandise in Florida is experiencing a revival with the assistance of Justin Sun's Tron. However, this transformation is not evident in their office environment.

data.title: White House released an Executive Order "Ending Crime and Disorder on America's Streets" targeting homelessness and mental illness, making it easier to involuntarily treat people with serious mental illnesses.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Arlington, Virginia, a recent Executive Order titled "Ending Crime and Disorder on America's Streets" was unveiled by the White House. The Order aims to streamline the process of involuntarily treating individuals with severe mental illnesses. This initiative is part of a larger effort to address issues related to mental health and public safety. The Order calls for federal agencies to work towards facilitating the treatment of individuals with serious mental illnesses.

data.title: Federal Home Loan Bank of Boston reports $47.0 million net income in Q2 2025, declares dividend.
data.description: In Boston on July 25, 2025, the Federal Home Loan Bank revealed its tentative second-quarter financial outcomes for 2025 with a reported net income of $47.0 million. The Bank anticipates submitting its quarterly report on Form 10-Q for the same period.

data.title: Northeast Bank (NASDAQ: NBN) quarterly earnings announcement on July 28, 2025, estimated EPS $2.57, investors hopeful for positive news.
data.description: Northeast Bank (NASDAQ: NBN) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Monday, July 28, 2025. Analysts predict the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $2.57. Shareholders are eagerly anticipating the announcement, with hopes of exceeding expectations and receiving optimistic guidance for the future. Find the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Two Harbors Inv (NYSE: TWO) to reveal quarterly earnings on 2025-07-28, estimated EPS $0.32. Expectations high for beating estimates.
data.description: Two Harbors Investments (NYSE: TWO) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Monday, July 28, 2025. Analysts predict the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.32. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, expecting Two Harbors Investments to potentially exceed these projections and deliver positive guidance for the upcoming period. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
